description: The disc golf drive from Kansas City to the Detroit area for Worlds (spectating), Aug 17-25, 2026, in a truck camper. Drive east hitting top courses in travel order with the booked campground each night, then basecamp at Proud Lake Recreation Area Aug 24-31 while spectating Worlds. Stops are in travel order; edit and re-run build_route.py to reroute.

stops.name: Kansas City, MO
stops.notes: Leg origin — wake up in KC, drive east

stops.name: Eagles Crossing
stops.notes: New Truxton, MO · World #9 / US #4 / MO #1 · 12 PM tee · play both courses (also Wild Times, MO #3)

stops.name: Walnut Point SP
stops.notes: Oakland, IL · Fox Squirrel Site 1 · 1 night · conf 68096

stops.name: Versailles SP
stops.notes: Versailles, IN · Loop B Site 120 · 1 night · conf 2-39907318

stops.name: Idlewild
stops.notes: Burlington, KY (Cincinnati) · World #22 / US #11 · Reds game in the evening

stops.name: Van Buren SP
stops.notes: South Haven, MI · Site 209 · 1 night · conf INMI26-4385520B1

stops.name: Arvesta
stops.notes: South Haven, MI · World #78 / US #52 / MI #4 · up the lakeshore

stops.name: Holland SP

stops.name: Flip City

stops.name: Kensington Toboggan

stops.name: Proud Lake
stops.notes: 2928 Glengary Road, Commerce Twp, MI 48382 · Site 68 (Location 55-110) · 7 nights, truck camper · Worlds basecamp · Check in Mon 8/24 3:00 PM, check out Mon 8/31 1:00 PM · Reservation INMI26-3900592B1 · No sewer hookup · Recreation Passport required · (248)685-2433
